busabase._note: Send fields (type, phase, from_identity_id, subject, preview_text, segment_id, audience_size, status, proposed_action, reason, body, ref, risk, send_at) map to a Busabase record commit's fields. Agent-prepared sends become change requests; approve->review, edits->operation revisions, schedule/send->merge. Env overrides: KELLY_CAMPAIGNS_BUSABASE_URL / KELLY_CAMPAIGNS_BUSABASE_BASE_ID / KELLY_CAMPAIGNS_BUSABASE_API_KEY. The open-source single-tenant apps/busabase needs no api key; only busabase-cloud does.
